x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud-Related Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
These occur when the cardholder claims they did not authorize the transaction.

Comment:
Examples
Card-Not-Present Fraud (CNP Fraud): Unauthorized transaction in online, phone, or mail-order sales.

Card-Present Fraud (Counterfeit/Skimming): Fraudulent use of a physical card in-store.

Account Takeover: The cardholders account was compromised, and transactions were made without consent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorization-Related Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
These arise when the merchant processes a transaction without proper authorization.

Comment:
Examples:
Transaction Not Authorized: No prior approval from the cardholder or issuing bank.

Expired Card: Card used was no longer valid.

Incorrect Authorization Code: Authorization code did not match or was invalid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Processing Error Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargebacks in this category result from merchant or processor mistakes.

Comment:
Examples:
Duplicate Processing: Transaction posted more than once.

Incorrect Transaction Amount: Charged more than the agreed or authorized amount.

Incorrect Currency: Transaction processed in the wrong currency.

Invalid Transaction: Transaction that does not meet network rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Consumer Dispute Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
These occur when the cardholder disputes the transaction due to dissatisfaction or non-receipt.

Comment:
Examples:

Goods/Services Not Received: Cardholder claims they never received the product or service.

Defective/Not as Described: Product received but is damaged, defective, or different from what was advertised.

Canceled Recurring Transaction: Subscription or recurring payment charged after cancellation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Refund Issue Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cardholder claims they should have been refunded but werent.

Comment:
Examples:

Merchandise Return Not Credited: Returned item but merchant did not refund.

Refund Not Processed: Refund promised but not applied to card account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Complicance Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Transactions disputed due to legal, network, or compliance reasons.

Comment
Examples:
Incorrect Merchant Category Code (MCC): Transaction posted under wrong business type.

Violation of Network Rules: E.g., prohibited items sold, surcharge violations, or cardholder rights infringed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other Chargeback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Catch-all for reasons that dont fit neatly into the above categories.

Comment:
Often includes third-party processor errors, bank mistakes, or chargebacks due to system timeouts.
